comment: Short paraphrased lines of encouragement (original wording, public-domain themes). Used by PromiseStone interactables.

lines.hope: Carved on the stone: 'Mist can hide the road, but it cannot erase it.'
lines.faith: Carved on the stone: 'You do not stand because the mud is weak, but because mercy is strong.'
lines.perseverance: Carved on the stone: 'One true step is still obedience. Take it.'
